title: 10 General Information on Ordering Currency
body_text:
10	General Information on Ordering Currency
10.1	Types of Currency Available
You can order currency according to the denominations and quantities described below.

10.2	Currency Delivery and Supplies
Currency is delivered to cash locations by armoured car. Your financial institution must arrange with an armoured car company for the delivery of currency orders. Your financial institution also orders recap sheets and waybills from your armoured car company. The contract between your financial institution and the armoured car company does not constitute a part of these procedures.
Coin boxes, cash parcel bags, currency straps, and parcel tags are ordered from Westkey Graphics. Canadian and US deposit slips are provided by Davis and Henderson (D+H). To reorder deposit slips, use the D+H reorder form. If, for some reason, this form isnГўВҖВҷt available, contact Royal Bank to reorder deposit slips. See Section 1.2, Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources.
10.3	Currency Order Processing Dates
Canadian and US currency orders must be placed by 11:00 am (local time). Orders placed after 11:00 am local time are processed the next business day and delivered on the next scheduled delivery date. Coordinate with your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs armoured car company for your delivery date.
The table below is an example that indicates the cut-off times for locations depending on their configured days in transit. In Cash Services, the difference between the delivery date and the dispatch date indicates the days in transit. You can place orders well in advance in Cash Services for more flexibility in choosing the delivery date.
Deadlines for Currency Orders
Location
Scheduled Delivery Day
Days in Transit

Prior to 11:00 am (local time)

Friday

Previous Thursday

Monday
4
Previous Monday
If you miss the 11:00 am (local time) cut-off for delivery, you can submit a late order request as described in Section 9.4, Creating Late Orders in ServiceNow.
Holiday Processing Dates
Cash Services automatically identifies holidays and determines delivery days based on date of order and location. When you enter an order around a holiday date, make sure that the delivery date available in the Cash Services calendar is the date you want the funds delivered. If you need funds delivered sooner than the calendar in Cash Services allows, submit the order earlier or create a late order in ServiceNow. See Section 9.4, Creating Late Orders in ServiceNow.
10.4	Verifying Incoming Cash Parcels
The contents of incoming cash parcels must be verified in detail, in joint custody, within 24 hours of receipt. Verify the number of bank notes received in each denomination, and verify the authenticity (e.g., no counterfeit) of each bank note.
10.5	Handling Discrepancies in Incoming Cash Parcels
If the value of an incoming cash parcel from Royal Bank does not correspond to the value ordered, immediately complete the RBC ГўВҖВ“ Claim for Discrepancy in Cash/Coin Parcel Received, Form 2117. See Figure 1. It is recommended that financial institutions retain excess bank notes or coin.
If warranted, an adjustment will be issued once Royal Bank investigates the claim. Your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs Central 1 account will be adjusted when Royal Bank settles with Central 1.
Important
:	Financial institutions can only claim reimbursements for cash parcel discrepancies that are greater than $20 Canadian or $20 US.
Submit a cash parcel discrepancy claim to Royal Bank as follows:
Complete the RBC ГўВҖВ“ Claim for Discrepancy in Cash/Coin Parcel Received, Form 2117. See Figure 1.
ГўВ‘
Royal Bank Cash Services Centre
ГўВҖВ“ Select the Royal Bank Services Centre that corresponds to your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs location.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Complete the Strap/Cash Parcel Discrepancy section and/or the Coin Box Discrepancy section, as applicable.
Note:	If the cash parcel discrepancy is short or over a whole bundle, select the ГўВҖВңParcel Tag AttachedГўВҖВқ check box in the Strap/Cash Parcel Discrepancy section. You must submit the parcel tag so that RBC can see which financial institution it came from.
If the discrepancy doesnГўВҖВҷt constitute a whole bundle, select the ГўВҖВңStrap AttachedГўВҖВқ check box. You must submit the bundle strap so that RBC can see which financial institution it came from.
ГўВ‘Вў
Have the branch manager and the joint custodian sign the form.
Figure 1: RBC ГўВҖВ“ Claim for Discrepancy in Cash/Coin Parcel Received, Form 2117
Make a copy of the form, the currency strap, and/or the parcel tag. Retain the copies for your records.
You must send the completed form and the original currency strap, parcel tag, or coin box to your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs Royal Bank cash centre the next time you receive a cash parcel delivery by armoured car.
Once Royal Bank has reviewed and verified the currency discrepancy claim, the settlement will be sent to CentralВ 1. When settlement is received, Central 1 will credit or debit your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs account.
Related Information
RBC ГўВҖВ“ Claim for Discrepancy in Cash/Coin Parcel Received,
Form 2117
10.6	Handling Counterfeit Bank Notes in Incoming Cash Parcels
If you find counterfeit bank notes in an incoming cash parcel from Royal Bank, return the counterfeit bank notes to Royal Bank along with the RBC ГўВҖВ“ Claim for Discrepancy in Cash/Coin Parcel Received, Form 2117, and the currency strap and/or parcel tag.
If you receive counterfeit bank notes on deposit, see procedures in Section 11.11, Handling Counterfeit Bank Notes Received on Deposit.
Important
:	Financial institutions can only claim reimbursement for counterfeit bank notes that are greater than $20 Canadian or $20 US.
Return counterfeit bank notes received in an incoming cash parcel to Royal Bank as follows:
Complete the RBC ГўВҖВ“ Claim for Discrepancy in Cash/Coin Parcel Received, Form 2117, as shown in Figure 2:
ГўВ‘
Royal Bank Cash Services Centre
ГўВҖВ“ Select the Royal Bank Services Centre that corresponds to your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs location.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Strap/Cash Parcel Discrepancy
ГўВҖВ“ Complete the Strap/Cash Parcel Discrepancy section.
ГўВ‘Вў
Put a check mark in the Counterfeit Notes box.
ГўВ‘ВЈ
Have the branch manager and the joint custodian sign the form.
Figure 2: RBC ГўВҖВ“ Claim for Discrepancy in Cash/Coin Parcel Received, Form 2117
Make copies of the form and the currency strap and/or parcel tag for your records.
You must send the following to your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs Royal Bank cash centre by armoured car the next time you receive a cash parcel delivery:
ГўВҲВ’
RBC ГўВҖВ“ Claim for Discrepancy in Cash/Coin Parcel Received, Form 2117
ГўВҲВ’
The original currency strap and/or parcel tag
ГўВҲВ’
The counterfeit currency
Once Royal Bank has reviewed and verified the counterfeit claim, settlement will be sent to CentralВ 1. When settlement is received, Central 1 will credit your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs account.
Related Information
RBC ГўВҖВ“ Claim for Discrepancy in Cash/Coin Parcel Received,
Form 2117
10.7	Poor Quality Bank Notes Received in Incoming Cash Parcels
In recent years, there has been a decrease in the quality of bank notes available to all financial institutions in Canada. Due to the high cost of printing, the Bank of Canada prints less bank notes and expects bank notes to remain in circulation for longer.
Financial institutions canГўВҖВҷt expect to receive the amount of new bank notes that was available in the past. Many financial institutions have educated their staff to work with poorer quality bank notes, and it is recommended that you use these bank notes on a regular basis. If a member complains, replace the bank notes with better quality notes.
If the notes in a shipment are of poorer quality than usual:
Complete the Cash Quality Return, Form 1390. See Figure 3.
Figure 3: Cash Quality Return, Form 1390
Email the form and the currency straps to your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs Royal Bank cash centre.
Return the bank notes as described in Section 11.7, Returning Unfit Canadian Bank Notes.
Important
: DonГўВҖВҷt send the bank notes to Central 1.
Royal Bank will investigate and respond directly to your financial institution.
Related Information
Cash Quality Return,
Form 1390
END
